BottleneckSummaryText: City B's refined_mana line stalls whenever mana_shard inputs stop reaching the processors.
OpportunityReasonText: Dungeon Beta is City B's fastest expedition lever for reopening stalled refined_mana processing.
RecommendationRationaleText: Use the recovered mana_shard window to restart processing, then pace the next dispatch before recovery strain stacks.
WhyCityMattersText: City B matters because a single mana_shard return can reopen processing and immediately change the city's next expedition priority.
